summary: Tested Public Datasheet Page fixes and Amazon Credentials API. All 14 backend tests pass. UI testing verified: 1) Public datasheet shows NO Amazon pricing/margin/source_url, 2) CTA section with 'Interested in this product?' and Call Us/Email Us buttons present, 3) Fast Delivery badge shown, 4) Dark theme correctly applied with CRM theme isolation, 5) Import Wizard has 3 tabs and 3-step flow working.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicDatasheetView.jsx correctly hides Amazon pricing fields (website_price, mrp, selling_price, margin)
No source_url link visible on public datasheet page
Call-to-Action section properly shows 'Interested in this product?' with Call Us/Email Us buttons
Fast Delivery badge correctly displayed instead of price badge
useCatalogueTheme hook properly removes CRM theme classes and sets dark theme
AccessoriesDatasheet.jsx PDF layout has no source_url section
Amazon credentials API endpoints working: GET /api/amazon/firms-with-credentials, POST /api/amazon/credentials, GET /api/amazon/credentials/{firm_id}
sanitize_brand_text function correctly replaces ARB with MG for new imports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Datasheet Page and Amazon Credentials API fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_83_public_datasheet.py covers: 1) Public datasheet API, 2) Amazon credentials CRUD endpoints, 3) sanitize_brand_text function logic, 4) Theme isolation hook, 5) AccessoriesDatasheet PDF layout. UI testing verified: Public datasheet page shows no Amazon pricing, has CTA section with Call Us/Email Us, Fast Delivery badge, dark theme applied. Import Wizard has 3 tabs (Bulk Scrape, Single URL, Manual Entry) and 3-step flow (Scrape → Select & Price → Push to Amazon).

features_verified.public_datasheet_no_amazon_pricing: PASS - No website_price, mrp, selling_price, margin visible
features_verified.public_datasheet_no_source_url: PASS - No source URL link visible
features_verified.cta_section_present: PASS - 'Interested in this product?' with Call Us/Email Us buttons
features_verified.fast_delivery_badge: PASS - Fast Delivery badge shown instead of price badge
features_verified.crm_theme_isolation: PASS - No CRM theme classes (theme-ocean, etc.) on public page
features_verified.amazon_credentials_api_get_firms: PASS - GET /api/amazon/firms-with-credentials returns firms with has_amazon_credentials flag
features_verified.sanitize_brand_text_function: PASS - ARB → MG replacement logic verified
features_verified.accessories_datasheet_no_source_url: PASS - PDF layout has no source_url section
features_verified.import_wizard_3_tabs: PASS - Bulk Scrape, Single URL, Manual Entry tabs present
features_verified.import_wizard_3_step_flow: PASS - Scrape → Select & Price → Push to Amazon flow working
